{{CargoRelic
|name=Eye of Medusa
|class_id=20506
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=03-12
|source=
|description=On Mar 12, 1800 BC, Medusa received Athena's wrath who turned her into a monster with serpents on her head.<br>Even with swan wings on her back and winding serpents on her head, Medusa was still a ravishing beauty. No one could escape the power of her beauty. Staring into those deep blue eyes will make one lose their soul and turn into stone.
[Medusa's Family]
Father: Phorcys; mother: Ceto; sisters: Euryale, Hesperides and Stheno; son: Pegasus and Chrysaor.
|fame=23
|art=29
|fth=48
|civ=30
|tech=24
|ss1=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill I.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, CIV Checks -5
}}
